summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Trading Agent web app. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend UI navigation, stock universe, AI analysis, trade queue, portfolio, and settings all working correctly. AI analysis via Gemini 3 Flash is operational and generating trade recommendations successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Only 10 stock cards visible despite 58 stocks being initialized - may need pagination implementation

passed_tests: API Health Check - All endpoints responding
Stock Universe - 58 stocks initialized across 10 sectors
Sector Filtering - IT sector filtering works correctly
AI Analysis - Gemini 3 Flash integration functional with 65% confidence
Trade Recommendations - BUY recommendation generated with 85% confidence
Trade Queue - Pending recommendations and approval workflow working
Portfolio Management - Holdings and P&L tracking functional
Dashboard Stats - All metrics displaying correctly
Settings Management - Upstox API configuration and risk parameters
AI Scan All - Background stock scanning initiated successfully
Frontend Navigation - All 7 pages accessible via sidebar
Stock Search and Selection - TCS selection and analysis workflow
Trade Approval Workflow - Approve/reject recommendations working
Risk Management Settings - Max trade value, position size, risk percentage configurable
